pi_items.source: Verified via setup_oracle_analytics.ps1 environment script which places the dataset at this exact path.
Confirmed via export_result.sh which explicitly checks for "*Supply_Chain_Forecast*.dva".
Task description strictly mandates exactly 3 periods into the future, and verifier.py assesses this requirement.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating an Oracle Analytics workbook named "Supply_Chain_Forecast" using the synthetic "Sample Order Lines" dataset located at "C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\OracleAnalyticsData\sample_order_lines2023.xlsx". The agent must generate a line chart and project a forecast 3 periods into the future. A critical finding is that while the instructions mandate charting "Revenue" by Order Date, programmatic inspection reveals the dataset completely lacks a "Revenue" column; the agent must deduce to use the existing "Sales" column instead.
